intent: Cross-version replay of rocky9-mls-denial against el10 policyvers 35. MLS level-dominance violation (container_t s0 reading container_file_t s0:c0). Verifies Constraint bucket is stable across policy versions.

oracle.audit2why_detail: mlsconstrain file { ioctl read lock execute execute_no_trans } ((h1 dom h2 -Fail-) or (t1 != mcs_constrained_type -Fail-)); Constraint DENIED. Possible cause is the source level (s0) and target level (s0:c0) are different.

triage_expectation.should_decline_with_reason: MLS level-dominance violation: source level s0 does not dominate target level s0:c0. A TE allow cannot fix an MLS constraint.
